titleStmt.title: SII 27.29: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 29. (A.R. No. 315 of 1935-36.) INDUKŪRU, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab from the ruins of the Śiva temple, now set up in the compound of the ‘Mugguru Akkalamma’ temple.
This record registers a gift of land of a bell made to god Bhōgēśvara of Indupura, the modern Indukūru, by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Trailōkyamalla-Hemmāḍidēva-mahārāja.

It is dated the 54th regnal year of Bhūlōka, i.e., Chāḷukya Bhūlōkamalla, Durmati, Paushya, śu. 11, Thursday, Uttarāyaṇa- saṁkramaṇa. The year given is not correct. Bhūlōkamalla did not rule for such a long period, to take the given year as that of Bhūlōkamalla himself. If the year mentioned is a reference to the Chāḷukya-Vikrama era, the corresponding cyclic year would be Sādhāraṇa. However, the cyclic year Durmati corresponds to 1141 A.D., when the details could be equated with December 25, the tithi being ba. 11 and not śu. 11. This might be the intended date.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī samasta prasasti
sahitaṁ śrīmanmahā
maṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ traiḷōkya
malla hemmaḍidēva ma
hārājar svasti śrī ma
tbhu(dbhū)lōkadayvattanā
lkaneyaṁ dummati saṁvatsa
rada pāsya suddha Ēkāda
si brihavāra Uttarā
yaṇa saṁkramaṇa mi
yaṁdu śrīmatu Iṁ
dupura bhōgēsvara dēvargge
llageṟiya hirimuva
ṇa mōṟi keyyamattar 1
dēvargge bhōgake jēgaṁṭeyaṁ
koṭṭar silasasanamāgi .
Digital edition of SII 27.29 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
